raw_reaction: 正しい。だがこれは再帰的な積分方程式をVolterra作用素で書いた標準解で、指数関数の消去も見通しはよいが忘れがたい別解とまでは言えない。
reason: Original stopping time and expectation are handled correctly, but the solution is essentially the standard renewal/Volterra recursion in operator notation; the eigenfunction framing overstates the distinctiveness needed for the target line.
